title: melon 16x
description: 16x watermelon and cat themed pvp/bedwars pack for both 1.8.9 and modern versions!
body:
![An image of a minecraft hotbar, with a watermelon theme over a pastel gradient.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7A371JwS/images/3e6d64ac9ae53206e2780be6f01ca0bae5c5c973.png)
## 
## Melon 16x 

1.8.9/modern texture pack with short swords and low fire - made for melncat
##
![A screenshot of various minecraft items retextured to be watermelon themed, with various accent colors matching their material on a dark green gradient background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7A371JwS/images/23b0869b01ea96e893ff67834733b1d452b34fd2.png)
